backend/main.mo: Defines core data types for appointments, clients, statistics, reports, and repetition logic within the main Motoko actor.
backend/migration.mo: Provides a migration module that preserves existing actor state while enabling updated logic.
feature_evidence.json: Lists feature evidence entries mapping features to related frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Contains prewritten summaries of various frontend files for build and feature planning.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML bootstrap file loading the React application root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app handling routing, authentication, profile setup, and theme initialization.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentActio: Dialog component offering edit or delete actions for a selected appointment, routing to corresponding subdialogs.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDelet: Dialog that lets users delete an appointment either individually or all future ones, using a delete mutation and showing status feedback.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentDialo: Form dialog for creating or editing appointments, handling validation, client reference checks, and mutation submission.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentEditM: Empty placeholder file with no implementation.
Displays appointments grouped and sorted with repetition labels and status, opening an action dialog for each item.
frontend/src/components/ClientPhotoField: Image upload field that validates, crops to 35×45mm, previews, and allows removing a client photo.
frontend/src/components/FinancialOvervie: Shows summary cards for monthly revenue, amounts due, and total completed appointments.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer displaying copyright and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Top navigation bar with routes, user actions, and a button to create a new appointment.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyListingTa: Renders a monthly financial listing table and computes various revenue and credit totals using memoized utility functions.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal prompting the user to enter and save their profile name with validation and mutation handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to the user’s Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides authentication context using Internet Identity, handling login, stored identities, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profiles, client records, appointments, and related CRUD operations using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base/theme setup plus custom styles for layouts, color variables, and compta grid alignment.
frontend/src/main.tsx: App entry point setting up React Query and Internet Identity providers before rendering the app.
frontend/src/pages/AgendaPage.tsx: Empty page placeholder for the agenda view.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDatabasePage.ts: Client database management UI with CRUD forms, sorting, photo upload, and data table linked to backend queries.
frontend/src/pages/ComptaMoisPage.tsx: Monthly accounting page computing appointments, payments, financial stats, and allowing edits with dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard showing financial summaries, monthly listings, and navigation across months.
frontend/src/pages/ListingMensuelPage.ts: Empty or placeholder page for monthly listing.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login screen using Internet Identity with a marketing-style feature overview.
frontend/src/pages/RapportPDFPage.tsx: Generates PDF reports and calculates revenues using monthly listing and appointment data.
frontend/src/pages/SemainePage.tsx: Empty or placeholder weekly view page.
frontend/src/utils/bigintMath.ts: Utility functions for bigint arithmetic and clamping.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: CSV export utilities including field escaping, array conversion, and download trigger.
frontend/src/utils/imageCrop.ts: Image cropping and resizing utilities for 35x45 photos and converting stored photos to URLs.
frontend/src/utils/monthlyListing.ts: Utilities for calculating monthly revenue, credits, and appointment-based financial metrics using bigint timestamps.
frontend/src/utils/timeRange.ts: Helpers for generating month-based bigint timestamp ranges and checking temporal conditions without precision loss.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Functions to read, persist, and clear URL and sessionStorage parameters, supporting both query and hash routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending colors, layout, animations, and plugins for the frontend UI.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing current features, issues, requirements, and architectural notes for the app.
